parameters.query: SELECT l.lead_id, l.client_id, l.email, l.first_name, l.last_name, l.company, l.phone, l.source, l.status, l.lead_score, l.company_domain, l.company_industry, l.company_size, c.name as client_name FROM leads l JOIN clients c ON l.client_id = c.client_id WHERE l.status = 'enriched' ORDER BY l.lead_score DESC, l.created_at ASC LIMIT 50;
SELECT config_key, config_value FROM client_config WHERE client_id = $1 AND config_key LIKE 'routing_%' ORDER BY config_key;
INSERT INTO lead_routing (lead_id, client_id, destination_type, destination_config, routing_status, sent_at, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, NOW(), NOW(), NOW());
UPDATE leads SET status = 'routed', updated_at = NOW() WHERE lead_id = $1;
UPDATE leads SET status = 'pending_manual_review', updated_at = NOW() WHERE lead_id = $1;

INSERT INTO workflow_executions (client_id, workflow_name, workflow_id, execution_id, status, input_data, output_data, started_at, updated_at) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, 'completed', $5, $6, NOW(), NOW());
